mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card display and behavior on Print and Payment History page when a subscription plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages progress bar, additional pages tracking, tooltips, and page usage information display across different printing scenarios.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: No printer enrollment methods, API helpers, or setup utilities found in this batch. This batch contains YAML test case definitions for Shipment Tracking and Update Plan pages (different from Print and Payment History page) and the aura.py CLI module which handles framework orchestration but not printer-specific setup. Printer enrollment methods likely exist in other batches containing API helpers or setup utilities.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription verification methods or API helpers found in this batch. The files in this batch are YAML test definitions and framework CLI code, not subscription management utilities. Subscription state verification methods likely exist in other batches containing API helpers or backend utilities.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: No subscription status verification methods found in this batch. This batch contains test case definitions and CLI orchestration code, not subscription state management. Status verification methods likely exist in other batches with API helpers or backend utilities.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.
precondition_mapping.notes: No pause plan methods, CIT modal page objects, or pause link locators found in this batch. The YAML test cases in this batch test different pages (Shipment Tracking, Update Plan) and do not contain pause plan functionality. The aura.py module is framework infrastructure. Pause plan components likely exist in other batches containing page objects for the dashboard or plan management pages.

test_case_mappings.no_match_reason: This batch contains 4 YAML test case definition files and 1 Python framework CLI module (aura.py). The YAML files (TC31266486, TC31266491, TC31266518, TC31409312) are test case definitions for Instant Services Shipment Tracking and Update Plan pages, which are completely different pages from the Print and Payment History page required by test case C44873414. These YAML files define test flows using AI-powered visual validation but do not provide reusable page objects, locators, or methods that can be imported and used in other tests. The aura.py module is the main command-line interface and orchestration entry point for the AURA framework. It contains utility functions for argument parsing (parse_args), configuration building (build_flow_args), requirements parsing (parse_requirements), flow scaffolding (add_flow), YAML processing (process_yaml), and the main orchestrator (aura). While these are important framework utilities, they are not relevant to the specific test case requirements which need: (1) Page objects for Print and Payment History page, (2) Locators for billing cycle card, progress bars, tooltips, info icons, page usage text, (3) Navigation methods to Print and Payment History page, (4) Verification methods for progress bar colors, tooltip content, page values, (5) Interaction methods for hovering/clicking info icons, (6) API helpers for time manipulation and print job simulation, (7) Responsive testing utilities for device-specific interactions. None of these components exist in this batch. The test case targets HP Instant Ink Print and Payment History page with billing cycle and page usage tracking, while this batch contains infrastructure for Shipment Tracking and Update Plan pages. Relevant components for test case C44873414 likely exist in other batches containing page objects for Print and Payment History, dashboard pages, API helpers for backend operations, or utility modules for responsive testing and visual verification.
